data.name: Sign in
data.value: Sign in

data.name: Sign in to {0}
data.value: Sign in to {0}

data.name: Choose an authentication provider for this {0} instance.
data.value: Choose an authentication provider for this {0} instance.

data.name: Sign in with Windows / AD
data.value: Sign in with Windows / AD

data.name: Other sign-in options
data.value: Other options

data.name: Use other credentials only when normal Windows / AD sign-in cannot be used.
data.value: Use other credentials only when normal Windows / AD sign-in cannot be used.

data.name: Other Windows / AD account
data.value: Other Windows / AD account

data.name: Sign in with another Windows / AD account
data.value: Sign in with another Windows / AD account

data.name: Use DOMAIN\user, .\user, user@domain, or a local account name.
data.value: Use DOMAIN\user, .\user, user@domain, or a local account name.

data.name: Windows account
data.value: Windows account

data.name: Local account
data.value: Local account

data.name: Local password
data.value: Local password

data.name: User name
data.value: User name

data.name: Password
data.value: Password

data.name: Confirm password
data.value: Confirm password

data.name: Sign in with local password
data.value: Sign in with local password

data.name: Sign in with a local OMP user name and password.
data.value: Sign in with a local OMP user name and password.

data.name: Create account
data.value: Create account

data.name: Create a local OMP account with a user name and password.
data.value: Create a local OMP account with a user name and password.

data.name: Cancel
data.value: Cancel

data.name: Windows sign-in could not be resolved.
data.value: Windows sign-in could not be resolved.

data.name: Alternate Windows sign-in is not available on this host.
data.value: Alternate Windows sign-in is not available on this host.

data.name: Enter a user name and password.
data.value: Enter a user name and password.

data.name: Enter a user name.
data.value: Enter a user name.

data.name: User name must be 256 characters or fewer.
data.value: User name must be 256 characters or fewer.

data.name: User name is already in use.
data.value: User name is already in use.

data.name: Password is required.
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: Password must be at least 8 characters.
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters.

data.name: Password and confirmation password do not match.
data.value: Password and confirmation password do not match.

data.name: The user name or password is incorrect.
data.value: The user name or password is incorrect.

data.name: Enter a Windows account name and password.
data.value: Enter a Windows account name and password.

data.name: Windows credentials could not be validated.
data.value: Windows credentials could not be validated.

data.name: Local password sign-in is disabled.
data.value: Local password sign-in is disabled.

data.name: The local password account is not linked to an OMP user.
data.value: The local password account is not linked to an OMP user.

data.name: The linked OMP user is disabled.
data.value: The linked OMP user is disabled.

data.name: The OMP user account could not be created.
data.value: The OMP user account could not be created.
